title: Baked Blocks: Potato+
description: This resource pack is made for those running the Baked Blocks Mod Pack on low-spec PCs. Less lag, more spuds, and all the fun!
body:
![Baked Blocks: Potato+ Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b71f5cdca84eca86ecb82c262895bcb8841d563c.png)

> **⚠️ NOTE FROM THE HEAD POTATO:**
> 
>This resource pack is made **exclusively** for those brave souls who:
> 
>🥔 Own a **super potato-ed PC** (you know who you are)
> 
>🧱 Have the **Baked Blocks Mod Pack** already installed

If you’re running a NASA rig or missing the baked mods, this pack might confuse your game and your soul.
Stick to your kind. Stick to the potatoes. 🌱

If not Go Now (Or else your Grandma will steal it) 

[![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Baked_Blocks-1bd96a?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=white)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/baked-blocks)

---------------------------------------------------------------------

**🥔 What is This Spud-Tastic Thing?**

This is the **Baked Blocks Potato + Resource Pack**, made exclusively for **Baked Blocks Mod Pack** users with PCs powered by dreams, dust, and maybe a fan or two. If your computer groans louder than a zombie at sunrise, this pack’s for you!

Built with performance in mind but style in heart, this isn’t just a resource pack—it’s a **potato-powered glow-up** for your Minecraft world!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**🎨 What’s Inside? (AKA: "I Did Stuff")**

Here’s what I threw into the oven and baked until crispy:

- 🟡 "**Java Edition**" **Text?** Replaced. Say hello to something much cooler.

- 🎯 **Crosshair?** Now **smaller and perfectly cubic**. Feels like you're aiming in style.

- 👑 **Golden Helmet?** Nah. Your head deserves better. It’s now a **crown**, because yes—you’re royalty now.

- ✨ **Enchanting Text Particles?** You know those mystical letters floating from bookshelves? **They're now COLORFUL.** Because enchantment = ✨rainbow letters✨.

- ✅ **Hotbar Selector?** Now a **fabulous green glow-up**, because selecting your sword should feel like choosing destiny.

- 🥔 **Potato Hunger Bar** (with AppleSkin support!) – It’s hunger tracking, but make it delicious.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**😂 Splash Attack!**

You thought it ended there? Nope.
This pack comes with **106 custom splash texts**—handwritten with love, sarcasm, and at least three potatoes. Every time you launch Minecraft, prepare for a random giggle.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**📜 Wait! Read This!**

Don’t skip the fun! There’s a **text file** in the **Baked Blocks Mod Pack description**—and trust me, you’ll want to read it. It’s got some extra spicy lore, laughs, and instructions, straight from the potato's mouth.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**🧑‍🍳 Why You Need This**

If you:

Installed the **Baked Blocks Mod Pack ✅**

Have a **PC that wheezes at the title screen ✅**

Want your game to look quirky but run smooth ✅

Enjoy crowns, colorful particles, and hotbars that scream “you’ve got taste” ✅

Then what are you waiting for?
**Download it. Install it. Let your inner baked potato shine.**
